name: Black Bean & Salmon Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 16 oz (1 cup) corn black beans, rinsed and drained
7 oz (1 cup) pink salmon with bones, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cut the tortillas into triangles and toast in the oven until crisp, about 5 minutes.
3. Flake the salmon with a fork and mix it with the beans.
4. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients (onion powder, garlic, celery salt, ground cumin, lime zest, safflower oil, red pepper flakes, chili powder) and stir until well mixed.
5. Serve the tortilla chips alongside the black bean and salmon mixture.
(How making these into tacos? I enjoy cooking but not that much.)
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 LOW-FAT MEAT EXCHANGE + 1/2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE; CAL: 68; CHO: 3mg; CAR: 8g; PRO: 4g; SOD: 75mg; FAT: 2g.
Source: Light & Easy Diabetes Cusine by Betty Marks.
